integrity.description: The agent opened and read the quality_review.txt file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening '/home/ga/Desktop/quality_review.txt' in a text editor (like Mousepad or Gedit) or viewing its contents using terminal commands (like cat or less).

integrity.description: The agent did not directly manipulate the MySQL database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots show the agent running 'mysql' commands or executing SQL scripts in the terminal to insert or update patient records.
